title: OpenBucket
description: Infinite bucket space for water and lava!
body:
# OpenBucket
**Allows for almost infinite space in buckets for lava and water!**

## Features:​
- Bucket can hold a **configurable** amount of water:
    - Water can be collected and placed in the world, cauldrons and waterlogged blocks.
    - Permission: openbucket.use.waterbucket
- Bucket can hold a **configurable** amount of lava:
    - Lava can be collected and placed in the world and cauldrons.
    - Permission: openbucket.use.lavabucket
- The use as lava bucket and water bucket can be individually disabled in the config all together or by giving players the permissions above.
- Currently you **can't** use the lava bucket as fuel in furnaces, the bucket to collect water after smelting a wet sponge, milk cows or capture fish and axolotls.

* All texts can be customized in the config file!
* Command: /openbucket
    * Gives you an open bucket
    * Permission: openbucket.admin.give

[Default config.yml](https://github.com/ttryy/OpenBucket/blob/master/src/main/resources/config.yml)

## More to come... (you got any ideas? let me know!)
